actions.response: The protocol supports deterministic research tasks with inspectable evidence.

observations.summary: research synthesis prepared with explicit sources
observations.final_response: The protocol supports deterministic research tasks with inspectable evidence.

research.conclusion: All reviewed sources agree the protocol supports deterministic research tasks.

sources.excerpt: At least two non-coding task categories have deterministic end-to-end tests proving runtime + verifier compatibility.
Non-coding verification benefits from a small typed evidence model attached to domain.Observation.

findings.claim: The protocol requires deterministic end-to-end proof for non-coding tasks.
Research verification is evidence-based rather than command-based.

verifications.reason: research evidence is complete and consistent
